essays:
```latex
\text{MATRIX MULTIPLICATION:} \\
[1 \quad 2] \quad [5 \quad 6] \quad [19 \quad 22] \\
[3 \quad 4] \times [7 \quad 8] = [43 \quad 50] \\
\text{THE RESULT COMES FROM TAKING THE DOT PRODUCT OF EACH ROW OF } A \text{ WITH} \\
\text{EACH COLUMN OF } B. \text{ FOR INSTANCE, } 43 = 3*5 + 4*7, \text{ AND } 22 = 1*6 + 2*8.
```

$$\text{CONVOLUTION (FILTER APPLIED TO IMAGE PATCH):}$$
$$[1 \quad 0] \quad [4 \quad 5]$$
$$[0 \quad -1] * [6 \quad 7] = -3$$
$$\text{THE FILTER SLIDES OVER THE PATCH, EACH OVERLAPPING PAIR IS MULTIPLIED, AND}$$
$$\text{THE FOUR PRODUCTS ARE SUMMED: } 1*4 + 0*5 + 0*6 + -1*7 = -3.$$

```latex
\begin{array}{l}
\text{DEF MULTIPLICATION\_TABLE}(N): \\
\quad \text{TABLE} = [] \\
\quad \text{FOR } I \text{ IN RANGE}(1, N + 1): \\
\quad \quad \text{ROW} = [] \\
\quad \quad \text{FOR } J \text{ IN RANGE}(1, N + 1): \\
\quad \quad \quad \text{ROW.APPEND}(I * J)
\end{array}
```
